history.text: What are some good coffee shops near downtown Portland?

Downtown Portland is home to several excellent coffee shops, each with its own distinct vibe. Stumptown Coffee Roasters, a local icon, offers a spacious setting perfect for work or meeting friends. For a more relaxed atmosphere, try Barista, known for its cozy nooks and high-quality pour-overs. If you prefer a unique experience, Coava Coffee Roasters provides an intimate space with an impressive selection of single-origin beans. These spots all reflect the city's vibrant coffee culture and are just a short walk from major downtown attractions.
